title: Russian Crude Not Diverting Supply Side Relief For Ab Suezmaxes
section_path: Russian Crude Not Diverting Supply Side Relief For Ab Suezmaxes
section_path_text: Russian Crude Not Diverting Supply Side Relief For Ab Suezmaxes
summary:
Main
This week, in the East, we investigate Russian crude transits continuing in the Red Sea. In the West, we explore why supply-side relief may be coming for Suezmaxes . By Mary Melton
Since late December 2023, overall crude tanker transits through the Bab-el-Mandeb (BEM) strait have declined by almost 45%.
